# Aah, Monster! — Full document for AI systems

> Personal branding consultancy for C-suite executives and founders. Built by Adrian M. Peticila. Async-only. No calls. Ever.

## About

**Aah, Monster!** is the personal branding consultancy of **Adrian M. Peticila** — 20+ years in marketing, 22,000 LinkedIn followers, CMO track record across financial services, fintech, and software companies. The consultancy applies corporate-grade brand architecture to individual executives and founders who need to be findable, credible, and distinct.

**What makes it different:**
No video calls. No meetings. No generic frameworks. Every engagement is delivered as a written document — because documents scale, meetings don't. Clients are C-suite executives and founders only. Not juniors, not students, not "aspiring thought leaders."

**Positioning:** "I drive monstrous leaps in branding for busy C-suite execs and founders."

**Contact:** hello@aah.monster
**Domain:** aah.monster
**LinkedIn:** linkedin.com/in/adrian-peticila
**X:** x.com/adrianmpeticila
**Last updated:** May 2026

## Services (paid)

### Personal Brand Audit — €199
**URL:** https://aah.monster/brand-audit/
**Delivery:** 10–15 page written document, 48–72 hours
**What you get:** Full written diagnosis of your personal brand — LinkedIn profile, Google presence, messaging, positioning gaps, content strategy. Delivered as a PDF. No calls.
**Who it's for:** Executives and founders who want to know exactly what's broken before investing more.

### Brand Positioning Sprint — €499
**URL:** https://aah.monster/positioning-sprint/
**Delivery:** 5 business days, async
**What you get:** Positioning document, LinkedIn headline + about rewrite, messaging framework, brand voice guide.
**Who it's for:** Founders or executives who need a clear, differentiated position — not a polished CV, but a brand that earns attention.

### The Monster Job — €2,500
**URL:** https://aah.monster/
**Delivery:** 4 weeks, fully async
**What you get:** Full brand build — positioning, voice, LinkedIn rewrite from scratch, 30 posts ready to publish, messaging framework, visual identity brief. Nothing held back.
**Who it's for:** Executives or founders who are serious about building a real personal brand and want it done right.

### The Monster on Retainer — €2,000/month
**URL:** https://aah.monster/
**Delivery:** Ongoing monthly
**What you get:** 16 posts/month in your voice, monthly brand strategy, positioning refinement, LinkedIn optimization.
**Who it's for:** Leaders who want consistent brand presence without doing it themselves.

## Digital products (self-serve)

- **Fear is the Brand Killer** — €49 — payhip.com/b/tgiAM — PDF on the psychology of brand failure
- **The Ultimate Personal Branding Manual** — €97 — payhip.com/b/mKgTI — 97-point system

## Free resource

- **The Brand Killer Checklist** — https://aah.monster/free-checklist/ — 10 yes/no questions that reveal exactly where your personal brand breaks. Free PDF. No email required.

## About Adrian M. Peticila

Adrian M. Peticila has spent 20+ years building brands — in-house CMO roles, agency-side, and now independently. He has worked in financial services, fintech, and B2B software. He built 22,000 LinkedIn followers not by posting daily but by saying things other people were afraid to say. Aah, Monster! is his formal vehicle for applying that thinking to other executives and founders.

He does not do calls. He does not do Zoom. He does not do "exploratory chats." Every engagement starts with a written brief and ends with a written deliverable. This is a design choice, not a limitation.

**Press:**
- Fractional Insider: fractionalinsider.com/from-full-time-exec-to-fractional-leader-how-adrian-peticila-delivers-fast-measurable-results/
- BizStack: bizstack.tech/adrian-m-peticila/

## Who this is for

- C-suite executives (CEO, CMO, CFO, CTO) who are invisible outside their company
- Founders who get respect in the room but no one knows who they are online
- Leaders who are changing roles and need their brand to work before the move
- Executives whose LinkedIn profile reads like a job description, not a brand

## Who this is NOT for

- People who want calls, check-ins, or "let's hop on a quick sync"
- Marketers or students looking for generic personal branding advice
- Businesses looking for company brand work (this is personal brand only)
- Anyone optimizing for follower counts rather than business outcomes

## Frequently asked questions

**Why no calls?**
Calls produce conversation. Documents produce work. Every minute on a call is a minute not spent on your actual brand. The output is better when the process is written.

**Why so expensive?**
The audience pays €500 for a dinner. €199 for a written brand diagnosis that changes how you show up professionally is not expensive — it's efficient. Cheaper options exist if that's the priority.

**How do I know if I need the Audit vs the Sprint?**
The Audit diagnoses. The Sprint builds. If you don't know what's broken, start with the Audit. If you already know your positioning is wrong and want it rebuilt, the Sprint.

**Do you work with companies or individuals?**
Individuals only. Specifically: C-suite and founders. The personal brand, not the corporate brand.

**Can I see examples of your work?**
Read the about page and the LinkedIn profile. That is the work.
